facts.claim: From chic design to exclusive experiences, Valiant Lady cruise ship offers smart cabins, luxury amenities, unique dining, and unforgettable entertainment.
Sailing from Barcelona, Valiant Lady ventures into the spectacular Mediterranean.
Soak up the iconic views, rich history, and warm sunshine of the Mediterranean on Valiant Lady’s unforgettable itineraries.
Valiant Lady is an American soap opera which ran daily on CBS radio and television from October 12, 1953, to August 16, 1957.
